title: phaleria revoluta
intro: Phaleria revoluta, also known as Javanese rue or Malay tea tree, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral agent, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Some of the health benefits associated with Phaleria revoluta include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in traditional medicine for its potential to boost the immune system and aid in wound healing.
